title: Messaging Basics
drDigitalIntro: Messages is how you text on your computer — you can send and receive text messages just like on a phone. Open the Messages app and start a new message with someone in your Contacts. Type your message and press Enter to send. Each conversation stays in the list so you can return to old chats. Messages syncs across your devices — if you reply on your computer, your phone knows about it.

playgroundTask.instructions: Alex wants to make plans! Type Dr. Digital's reply exactly as shown, then press Enter.
playgroundTask.incomingMessage: Hey! Want to meet at the coffee shop at 3pm tomorrow?
playgroundTask.requiredResponse: Yes, that sounds great! See you then.

drDigitalSuccess: Message sent! You just texted from your computer — it works exactly like texting from your phone.
drDigitalHint: Click the message box at the bottom, type the reply exactly as shown, then press Enter or click Send.
